title: Crazy Tweaks
description: Adds new crazy tweaks in game.
body:
# Crazy Vanilla Tweaks

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97c2056b7e6d8b40929d75bef61eb06882f1f2e5_0.webp)

## 🎮 Description

Crazy Vanilla Tweaks is a Minecraft mod that brings crazy changes to your Minecraft world. Each tweak can be turned on or off with simple commands.

### Compatible With
- ✅ Minecraft **1.21**


---

## ⚡ Features

### Dimension Tweaks
| Tweak | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| **Sleep Any Dimension** | Sleep in any dimension without worrying about bed explosions in the Nether or End. |
| **Water In Nether** | Place water buckets in the Nether.  |
| **Respawn Anchor Anywhere** | Use respawn anchors in any dimension.  |

### Item Tweaks
| Tweak | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| **Stack Totems** | Stack Totems of Undying up to 64.|
| **Stack Ender Pearls** | Stack Ender Pearls up to 64.|

### Mob Tweaks
| Tweak | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| **Enderman No Grief** | Endermen cannot pick up or place blocks. Protect your builds from accidental terraforming! |

### Player Tweaks
| Tweak | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| **Always Edible** | Eat food even when you're full. Snack time is anytime! |

### 🌍 World Tweaks
| Tweak | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| **Faster Furnaces** | Furnaces smelt items 2x faster. Speed up your smelting operations! |
| **Silk Touch Spawners** | Mine spawners with Silk Touch to move them.  |
| **Everything Slippery** | All blocks become as slippery as ice. |

---

## 📖 How to Use

### Commands
| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/vt list` | View all available tweaks and their status |
| `/vt enable <name>` | Enable a specific tweak |
| `/vt disable <name>` | Disable a specific tweak |
| `/vt toggle <name>` | Toggle a tweak on/off |
| `/vt info <name>` | Get detailed info about a tweak |
| `/vt reload` | Reload configuration |

### Example Usage
```
/vt list                        # View all available tweaks
/vt enable everything_slippery  # Make everything icy
/vt disable stack_totems         # Revert totem stacking
/vt toggle faster_furnaces      # Toggle faster furnaces on/off
```

---

## 📝 Configuration

Configuration file location: `config/crazy_vanilla_tweaks.json`

Tweaks are disabled by default. Use `/vt enable <tweak>` to enable!

---

## 🛠️ Technical Details

### Tweaks
- **Total**: 10 tweaks across 5 categories
- **Category**: Fabric Mod
- **Loader**: Fabric

### Installation
1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/)
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Download and install this mod
4. Launch the game and enjoy!
